title: PREPARE type checking error
poc: PREPARE i FROM 'INSERT INTO tests SET t_date = NULLIF(?, '''')';
PREPARE i FROM 'INSERT INTO tests SET t_date = IF(? = '''', NULL, ?)';
key_bug_features: PREPARE statement with NULLIF() and empty string
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, t_date DATETIME NULL);
PREPARE stmt1 FROM 'INSERT INTO test_dates (t_date) VALUES (NULLIF(?, ''''))';
PREPARE stmt2 FROM 'INSERT INTO test_dates (t_date) VALUES (NULLIF(?, ''''))';
